text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is finally here! This will be a great
opportunity for Bamboo Memory to brush up on
her skills for the Swan Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp... It rolls right off the tongue... Just
saying the words brings a tear to the eye!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! I want you to bring the heat, okay?! Push
me until my very soul is trembling!
choice_data_list: I'm not gonna go easy on you!
I'm not gonna go easy on you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, our scorching-hot summer camp begins!
